checks: Dashboard stat cards — cluster status display
Clusters list table — health status column
Cluster detail page — status in header

findings.description: Status inconsistency across views for test-cluster-minikube — NOT FIXED in v120
findings.evidence: Dashboard card shows 'Degraded', Clusters list shows 'Warning', Cluster detail page shows 'Healthy', Header dropdown shows 🟢 (healthy). All four views show DIFFERENT statuses for the same cluster. The status field unification did NOT work — three separate values are displayed across the three required views.
Dashboard Clusters section header shows '1 live · 2 registered' — counter is working correctly.

findings.description: SSE MIME errors — fixed since v119
findings.evidence: Console check returned no errors. SSE connection shows 'Connected · Synced just now'.

findings.description: prod-cluster-eks status also inconsistent: Dashboard='Degraded', Clusters list='Error'
findings.evidence: Dashboard card shows 'Degraded' for prod-cluster-eks while Clusters list table shows 'Error'. The status unification bug affects BOTH clusters, not just minikube.
